allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: d = json.loads\(line\) role = d.get\('role', ''\) content = d.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:200]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:200]}'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\)[:500] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\('message',{}\).get\('content',''\),str\) else ''\) for l in lines[-20:]]")
